label: Transparent scarlet ibis motif
prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: Scarlet Ibis transparent motif chroma-key source
Primary request: Create an isolated high-detail Scarlet Ibis motif cutout for a design-system catalog.
Subject: A full-body scarlet ibis in an elegant three-quarter standing pose, vivid layered scarlet plumage with subtle orange-red feather structure, long curved black bill, slim dark legs, small natural eye, and clean natural proportions. Add tiny hints of teal lagoon reflected in feather shadows while keeping the bird primarily scarlet and black.
Composition/framing: centered complete cutout with generous padding and no crop. Polished naturalist editorial illustration with crisp edges, suitable as a transparent UI asset.
Transparent workflow: place the ibis on a perfectly flat solid #00ff00 chroma-key background for removal. The background must be one uniform color with no shadows, gradients, texture, reflections, floor plane, lighting variation, or texture. Do not use #00ff00 anywhere in the subject.
Constraints: no text, no watermark, no second bird, no landscape scene, no cast shadow, no contact shadow, no reflection, no floor plane.

label: Light-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Scarlet Ibis light-mode design-system board
Primary request: Create a complete 3840x2160 light-mode design system board for a Morphous catalog theme named "Scarlet Ibis". Motif: scarlet ibis plumage in a mangrove lagoon, bold travel system.
Canvas: exact 16:9 high-resolution UI board, clean white/shell background, organized grid, readable labels. Title: "Scarlet Ibis". Subtitle: "Bold travel UI for mangrove lagoon journeys".
Palette: vivid scarlet feather reds, nearly black bill ink, teal lagoon water, mangrove leaf green, warm sand, pale shell neutrals, and soft feather highlights.
Required visible sections: Palette tokens, Typography, Japanese Typography, Navigation, Travel dashboard, Booking form, Data table, Charts, Status badges, Buttons and controls, Cards, Alerts, Texture and spacing.
UI coverage: sidebar navigation, top tabs, search field, form inputs, select, checkbox, switch, primary/secondary/destructive buttons, status badges, alert states, metric cards, bar chart, line chart, donut chart, and readable data table.
Copy guidance: use generic travel operations labels only, such as Routes, Tide window, Lagoon pass, Check-in, Vessel, Guests, Permit status, Itinerary, Capacity, and Revenue.
Style: scarlet primary actions and active states, black-bill ink text, teal data surfaces, fine feather-striation texture accents, mangrove-neutral borders, compact professional dashboard layout, 8px radius, crisp shadows.
Constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no fake company logo, no tiny unreadable labels, no generic purple or blue gradient dominance, no one-note palette.

label: Dark-mode design-system board
prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: Scarlet Ibis dark-mode design-system board
Primary request: Create a complete 3840x2160 dark-mode design system board for a Morphous catalog theme named "Scarlet Ibis". Same system as the light board: scarlet ibis plumage, black bill, teal mangrove lagoon, bold travel UI.
Canvas: exact 16:9 high-resolution dark UI board, deep black-bill and mangrove-night background, organized grid, readable labels. Title: "Scarlet Ibis". Subtitle: "Dark mode travel operations for lagoon routes".
Palette: luminous scarlet feather reds, black bill ink, teal lagoon charts, mangrove olive panels, warm sand labels, and shell highlights.
Required visible sections: Palette tokens, Typography, Japanese Typography, Navigation, Travel dashboard, Booking form, Data table, Charts, Status badges, Buttons and controls, Cards, Alerts, Texture and spacing.
UI coverage: left navigation rail, top tabs, search field, form inputs, select, checkbox, switch, primary/secondary/destructive buttons, status badges, alert states, metric cards, bar chart, line chart, donut chart, and readable data table.
Copy guidance: use generic travel operations labels only, such as Routes, Tide window, Lagoon pass, Check-in, Vessel, Guests, Permit status, Itinerary, Capacity, and Revenue.
Style: luminous scarlet primary actions and active states, teal lagoon charts, warm sand labels, mangrove-olive muted panels, feather-striation texture accents, crisp contrast, compact professional dashboard layout, 8px radius, restrained shadows and glows.
Constraints: no watermark, no random brand names, no fake company logo, no tiny unreadable labels, no pure-black flat background, no neon-only hacker UI, no generic purple or blue gradient dominance, no unrelated saturated colors.
